case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. THOMAS JORDAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT JORDAN, THOMAS DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER PERMITTING SERVICE BY POSTING AND MAILING PURSUANT TO CCP 415.45
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT JORDAN, THOMAS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JORDAN, THOMAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1728 SUNNYDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $28.40 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT JORDAN, THOMAS
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AND DEC. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
